Version 1.1.0 (2026-04-26)
  - Added image_compat_warn option (default: false)
  - When enabled: detects legacy CKEditor 5 image markup (figure.image,
    figure.image_resized, image-style-* classes) on init and SetContent
  - Shows a one-time warning notification asking the editor to reformat
    affected images with the new image formatting toolbar
  - No automatic conversion – detection and notice only

Version 1.0.0 (2026-02-06)
  - Initial release
  - UIkit 3 width classes with breakpoint support
  - Bootstrap width classes
  - Original size and small preset
  - Disable manual image resizing
